message:
fix(codegen): Fix anonymous param tracking and duplicate module declarations

- Track anonymous params in var_renames when making params unnamed (_:)
  to prevent body codegen from emitting discards for non-existent names
- Skip emitting import_module() const for modules already declared as stubs
- Mark skipped modules as declared to prevent assignment in main()
- Replace panic with undefined for open() called with no args (alias case)

@core1: 19/65 (29.2%) up from 18/65 (27.7%)
